TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Buklavu, title = Buklavu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Buklavu} }

S.FORM: alang Buklavu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 225 buwan, 716 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 689 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 27 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 89%, Paywan 3%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Buklavu hya' ga Su nun sung. tay 'llaw na Buklavu hya' ga Kaminu. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Buklavu ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Buklavu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 225 buwan, 716 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 689 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 27 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 89%, Paywan 3%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Buklavu hya' ga Su nun sung. tay 'llaw na Buklavu hya' ga Kaminu. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Buklavu ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βukla*u ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ɣenħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, pajwan *%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na βukla*u ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕu nun s~ɕuŋ. taj ʔllaw na βukla*u ħjaʔ ɣa kaminu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ βukla*u ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan kħu s~ɕkwan βiru maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
